title: Pride Flags
description: Adds placeable pride flags to minecraft!
body:
This mod adds placeable pride flags to minecraft! You can use them for decoration or for fun. It includes these flags:

- Progressive Pride
- Old pride
- Asexual
- Bisexual
- Gay
- Genderfluid
- Intersex
- Non-Binary
- Lesbian
- Pansexual
- Transgender


If you would like me to add another flag, send me an [issue on github](https://github.com/Maxb0tbeep/pride-flags/issues)
